rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARIA A. GRIJALVA TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent'S Motion To Compel Petitioner Alfredo Grijalva To Appear For Desposition And Produce Documents
rulings.Rulings: Matter on Calendar for Monday, September 18, 2006. Respondent Nelson Grijalva's motion to compel petitioner Alfredo Grijalva to appear for deposition and produce documents is continued to October 4, 2006 to be heard at the same time as petitioner's motion to compel deposition testimony. The Court orders that petitioner provide respondent with a log describing any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege, including the attorney client or attorney work product privilege, by September 22, 2006. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to both motions in advance of the hearing. = (610/BEC)
